events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: leaving Schrader cores in during evacuation chokes the port so the system can't reach a proper deep vacuum, leaving moisture/air in the circuit — a fail condition (non-compliant with EPA 608/ACCA/mfr specs) with high risk of acid formation and compressor damage since the unit is already in service. Corrective actions specify recovering charge, pulling cores with a core-removal tool, re-evacuating to spec, and verifying before recharge.
